textByHash.a6d800e62ec84916edebce828785952ae5e6355a: I don't believe all this rubbish about an invasion. If mankind wanted to, they could have invaded before now.
textByHash.a702b7fa95f2b3b10c9d654df6ca097b6912b247: Well, as you helped me I suppose I could. We'll have to be careful. If I get caught I'll be in the cage!
textByHash.53fb62f201d9e76796ba8b9facc8241e38dc5735: Jump in the back of the cart. It's a food delivery, we should be fine.
textByHash.a6c9799b28ea7782978ec47f8a8835bed2ffe817: Why should I help you, you wouldn't help me!
textByHash.57e52a2482ed838f0062f95402ae8c0e787d6922: So was lifting that barrel! Tell you what, call it a round 1000 gold pieces.
textByHash.11121f4b0c34059921c4143276c4516505c9a74a: That's right, 1000 and I'll sneak you in.
textByHash.44adcf22170ad8319ab131030e10edfc02e1f13d: Alright, jump in the back of the cart. It's a food delivery, we should be fine.
textByHash.b8e108e20a0daf5d13f35c19cb7aa890d9e2c370: OK traveller, you'd better get going.
textByHash.286f2745fd0324cbf5c1820b07f332014dc0bab4: Now, to get this lot to the Grand Tree!
textByHash.dc72de9feac3ab911c53f9743b97d630841df2f9: No, I'm OK traveller. I can manage from here.
textByHash.a6b4b42fe777034bc44767d0bf0b031fd7596dc0: Could you help me lift these boxes? They are really heavy!
textByHash.cbf6828eb94a71ea60d338e4cb2ca292815dddf4: Oh, okay, I'll do it myself.
